summary: Replace stale NAMECHEAP_API_KEY_QUERY user-facing references with NAMECHEAP_API_KEY.
reason: config.Load reads NAMECHEAP_API_KEY, so hints and agent/MCP metadata must not direct users to an ignored environment variable.
validated_outcome: TestAuthStatusHintUsesNamecheapAPIKeyEnv verifies auth status hints use NAMECHEAP_API_KEY and omit NAMECHEAP_API_KEY_QUERY.
